creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Dear submitter, 
I'm really sorry, but here we're unable to handle your report in your 
native language. 
Please either report this in english or ask your questions on some  
native mailing list. We're having some spanish speaking mailing  
lists right around your corner, willing to help you in your native language. 
I'll close this report after a timeout of 10 days if you're unable to 
file an english language followup. 
Please don't hesitate to drop us a note but please understand we're unable 
to handle all those thousands native languages here in our problem 
handling database. 
Thank you for your understanding.
